title: Senior Financial Analyst - Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
company: Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates in Nashik is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates:
Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates!
